center.name: George Brown Darwin Botanic Gardens
center.summary: George Brown Darwin Botanic Gardens是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Red-collared lorikeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-collared lorikeet (Trichoglossus rubritorquis) is a species of parrot found in wooded habitats in northern Australia (north-eastern Western Australia, northern Northern Territory and far north-western Queensland)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The red-collared lorikeet (Trichoglossus rubritorquis) is a species of parrot found in wooded habitats in northern Australia (north-eastern Western Australia, northern Northern Territory and far north-western Queensland)
